name: HWR_FLW_AUTHENTICATION
description: This table stores the authentication related information that user can input from data integration admin UI

columns.Name: SOURCE_ID
columns.Comments: This is the primary key for this table.

columns.Name: REQUEST_URL
columns.Comments: The social media request token URL.

columns.Name: RESPONSE_TYPE
columns.Comments: The response type parameter value for authorization.

columns.Name: ACCESS_TOKEN_URL
columns.Comments: The social media access token URL.

columns.Name: GRANT_TYPE
columns.Comments: The grant type parameter value for token request.

columns.Name: CALLBACK_URL_PARAMETER
columns.Comments: The callback URL parameter to distinguish the actual opt in social media.

columns.Name: PROFILE_REQUEST_URL
columns.Comments: The social media REST URL to get user profile.

columns.Name: PROFILE_REQUEST_PARAMETER
columns.Comments: The social media REST URL paramenter to get user profile.

columns.Name: AUTH_ATTR_1
columns.Comments: AUTH_ATTR_1. This is the extra attribute in case if needed.

columns.Name: AUTH_ATTR_2
columns.Comments: AUTH_ATTR_2. This is the extra attribute in case if needed.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
